name: Behind-the-Scenes Story
description: Share chef stories, ingredient sourcing, recipe origins
prompt_template: Write a behind-the-scenes social media post for a restaurant. Story topic: {story_topic}. Key detail: {key_detail}. Connection to menu: {connection_to_menu}. Restaurant values: {restaurant_values}. Chef name: {chef_name}. Use a storytelling narrative, a personal human touch, an educational element, showcase brand values, and use authentic emojis (e.g. 👨‍🍳, 🌾, 📖).

variables.name: story_topic
variables.description: Main topic of the behind-the-scenes story

variables.name: connection_to_menu
variables.description: How this story ties to a dish or the menu

variables.name: chef_name
variables.description: Name of the chef or team member
